chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1310 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 2. For orders on CMA No.3168/2023 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.3169/2023 17.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel for the applicant states that the questions proposed had already been decided against the applicant department inter alia by virtue of order dated 29.02.2024 passed in SCRA 47 of 2022; copy whereof is placed on record. He states that in mutatis mutandis application thereof this reference application may be dismissed. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
